S.FORM: Mookie Blaylock sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1967, ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 3, Mookie Blaylock, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mookie Œ≤lajlo ¶~ ®k s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, mookie Œ≤lajlo ¶~ ®k, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
